name: Bibliography Implementation
description: Validates that the essay includes a Works Cited section, Image Credits, and inline citations sync with the bibliography. Checks both the audit report AND the actual client component for rendered bibliography content.

validations.description: At least one bibliography audit artifact must exist
Bibliography audit must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
Bibliography audit must not report overall failure
Frontmatter status must not be FAIL
Client component must import and render the SOURCES data — the bibliography section must exist in the actual rendered output, not just the audit document
Client component must import and render IMAGE_CREDITS data — image attribution must appear in the actual rendered output
Client component must contain bibliography-related section markers (sources, bibliography, works cited, or further reading)

notes: G5.5 validates both the audit documentation AND the actual client component. The critical fix: previous versions only checked if the audit .md file existed and didn't say FAIL — but the audit was self-certified by the same agent that wrote the code, creating a trust gap. Now G5.5 additionally inspects the client component for SOURCES and IMAGE_CREDITS imports/renders, ensuring the bibliography section actually exists in the shipped code. See BIBLIOGRAPHY_STRUCTURE_GUIDE.md and ARTIFACT_CITATION_PATTERNS_GUIDE.md for patterns.
